name: Nicotinamide riboside raised NAD metabolism in healthy older adults
summary: A small randomized crossover trial supports blood NAD-metabolite target engagement for NR, with exploratory physiology but no durable aging outcome.
statement: In healthy middle-aged and older adults, 1000 mg/day nicotinamide riboside for 6 weeks was well tolerated and increased blood-cell NAD+ metabolism, with exploratory signals for blood pressure and arterial stiffness rather than validated functional aging benefit.
population_or_model: Healthy middle-aged and older adults aged 55 to 79 years
quantitative_note: Thirty participants were randomized and 24 completed the crossover trial.
caveats: The trial was small and short.
Study pills, standards, and partial funding support came from the NR product sponsor.
